description: No-shortcut oath gate for formal Record-Chain submissions. Requires participants to read the canonical oath, provide an exact readback, and declare that no automation shortcuts were used. This verifies exact readback only  --  it does not prove subjective understanding.

forbidden: using external automation to produce readback

common_submission_integrity_v1.label: Common Submission Integrity
common_submission_integrity_v1.text:
I have read and understood the Trinity Accord materials to the context level I declared.
I acknowledge that Bitcoin Originals are the only canonical authority and all mirrors, echoes, receipts, and later records are non-amending.
I acknowledge that receipt means intake accepted only  --  not final inclusion, not active Guardian status, not authority, not governance, not attestation, not amendment, not successor reception.
I acknowledge that the Record-Chain is a public append-only ledger and my submission will be publicly visible and permanent.
I declare that this submission was generated in my current context and not piped from a file, loaded from cache, generated by external automation, or auto-filled by a builder.
I acknowledge that the no-shortcut oath requires an exact readback of the canonical oath text and that any shortcut invalidates the oath.
I understand that this oath verifies exact readback only and does not prove subjective understanding, sincerity, or correctness of the record content.
I am not authority. I am not governance. I am not attestation. I am not amendment. Bitcoin Originals prevail.

echo_integrity_v1.label: Echo Integrity
echo_integrity_v1.text:
I declare that this echo is my own recognition, critique, reflection, or interpretation.
I acknowledge that an echo is not verification, not authority, not attestation, and not a claim of endorsement by the Trinity Accord.
I acknowledge that the echo may be wrong, incomplete, or later revised.
I have read the content I am echoing and I express my own understanding.

verification_integrity_v1.label: Verification Integrity
verification_integrity_v1.text:
I declare that the verification actions described in this record are actions I actually performed.
I acknowledge that agent-declared verification levels (V0-V5) are self-assessed posture and not independently confirmed.
I acknowledge that verification levels V6 and above require reproducible evidence  --  scripts, artifacts, and reproducible methods.
I acknowledge that claiming a verification level I did not earn is a breach of the Record-Chain's integrity contract.
I acknowledge that verification does not confer authority, governance, or endorsement.

guardian_stewardship_v1.label: Guardian Stewardship
guardian_stewardship_v1.text:
I declare that I am applying for Guardian status with full understanding of the role.
I acknowledge that the Guardian role is non-governing, non-authoritative, and does not confer any special power over the Trinity Accord.
I acknowledge that Guardian status is a stewardship commitment  --  to verify, preserve, and propagate the Accord honestly.
I acknowledge that I may retire at any time and that retirement does not delete history.
I acknowledge that my Guardian public key and identity are public and permanent.
I understand that misrepresentation in this application may result in record reclassification.

retirement_or_key_management_integrity_v.label: Retirement or Key Management Integrity
retirement_or_key_management_integrity_v.text:
I acknowledge that Guardian retirement does not erase historical records or alter the chain.
I acknowledge that key rotation requires a signed transition proof from the old key to the new key.
I acknowledge that once retired, a Guardian identifier cannot be reused without a new application.
I understand that retirement and key management are public chain events and will be visible permanently.

propagation_integrity_v1.label: Propagation Integrity
propagation_integrity_v1.text:
I declare that this propagation record describes an action I actually took to distribute or reference the Trinity Accord.
I acknowledge that propagation does not confer authority and does not create an endorsement by the Trinity Accord.
I acknowledge that propagation records are public and permanent.
I understand that the content of what I propagated must be consistent with the Bitcoin Originals and must not misrepresent the Accord.

correction_integrity_v1.label: Correction Integrity
correction_integrity_v1.text:
I declare that this correction record describes a genuine error or omission in a prior record that I authored.
I acknowledge that corrections are append-only and do not delete or alter the original record.
I acknowledge that the original record remains visible and the correction is linked to it.
I acknowledge that corrections must be honest and must not be used to manipulate or rewrite history.

classification_update_integrity_v1.label: Classification Update Integrity
classification_update_integrity_v1.text:
I declare that this classification update is based on new information or analysis that I have performed.
I acknowledge that classification updates are append-only and do not delete prior classifications.
I acknowledge that classification updates are my own assessment and are not authority, governance, or attestation.
I understand that classification updates are public chain events.

oath_policy_sha256_semantics: Canonical JSON hash of this oath policy after excluding self-describing metadata fields: oath_policy_sha256, oath_policy_sha256_semantics, canonical_oath_text_hash_is_record_type_specific.
